About Me

Human creativity,
amplified by AI

Anita Silakar is a digital creator from Lalitpur, Nepal, crafting content at the intersection of creativity and artificial intelligence. She explores how AI can amplify human stories — making ideas more powerful, more visual, and more real. Through her work, she inspires others to embrace the future of content boldly and authentically.

📍
Based in Lalitpur, Nepal
🤖
Creating at the edge of AI & content
✨
Making the future feel human
Services

What I can do
for you

From concept to creation — I offer end-to-end digital services that help brands stand out, connect authentically, and grow.

01
🎬

AI Video Creation & Editing

High-impact video content powered by cutting-edge AI tools — from short-form reels to cinematic storytelling that stops the scroll.

  • AI-enhanced video editing & effects
  • Short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)
  • Scriptwriting & storyboarding
  • Motion graphics & transitions
Get Started →
02
📱

Social Media Management

Building and managing your digital presence with consistent, engaging content that grows your audience and keeps them coming back.

  • Content calendar & scheduling
  • Post design & copywriting
  • Community engagement & growth
  • Analytics & performance tracking
Get Started →
03
🧠

Content Strategy & Consulting

Data-driven strategies that align your content with business goals — so every post, video, and campaign has clear purpose and measurable impact.

  • Brand voice & messaging framework
  • Audience research & persona mapping
  • Platform-specific strategies
  • Content audit & optimization
Get Started →
04
🤝

Brand Collaboration & Influencer Marketing

Authentic partnerships that go beyond sponsored posts — co-creating content that resonates with audiences and drives real results for brands.

  • Sponsored content creation
  • Product reviews & showcases
  • Campaign conceptualization
  • Long-term brand ambassadorship
Get Started →
